title: Adapter Identity
description: Identity and capability record for a registered adapter. Used by the selfcheck tool and drift detection.

adapter_name.description: Stable adapter identifier. Never changes between versions.

default_trust_level.description: Default trust level assigned to events from this adapter.

signing_capability.description: True if this adapter can verify cryptographic signatures on inputs.

supported_input_types.description: Input format identifiers this adapter handles. e.g. ["application/json", "text/plain"]

max_input_bytes.description: Maximum input size in bytes this adapter will process.

phase.description: Roadmap phase this adapter was introduced. e.g. Phase 3.
